framework.name: Two-Mode Authorization Model
framework.description: Distinguishes human-in-the-loop (consumer present, cart approved, transaction authorized) from autonomous (agent acts within pre-set parameters, merchant can request additional confirmation). In autonomous mode, disputes become cryptographic record vs. claimed intent — not he-said-she-said.
framework.raw_quote: If an agent books a flight outside a stated budget, or purchases the wrong product variant, the question of what was actually authorized moves from being a matter of memory to one of cryptographic record.

source.title: Mastercard and Google's new trust layer could reshape how AI buys for you
